homepageHeroLead: Family In My Backyard (FIMBY) is a shared space for the people in your neighbourhood: to ask for help, offer what you have, and stay connected in small everyday ways. Not a city-wide feed. Just the people around you.
canonicalParagraph: FIMBY (Family In My Backyard) is a neighbourhood mutual-aid platform for the people who actually live near you: ask for help, offer what you have, lend and borrow, gather, and share life in small everyday ways. Not a city-wide feed. Just the people around you.
_note: homepageHeroLead is the live homepage tagline — do not replace it. canonicalParagraph is for meta descriptions, JSON-LD, and store listings only.
bridgeSentence: FIMBY works in any browser at our.fimby.com and as a free app for iPhone and Android: same account, same neighbourhood.
platformLine: Same account, same neighbourhood — use FIMBY in your browser or get the app.
